data.text: I'll SEND the REPORT in the MORNING.
data.q: 強く読む語の組み合わせは？
data.explain: 英語は内容語（動詞・名詞）を強く、機能語（冠詞・前置詞）を弱く読む強勢拍リズム。

data.text: Can you GIVE me a HAND with this BOX?
data.explain: give a hand（手伝う）の内容語を強く。機能語は弱形で速く。

data.text: We NEED to CUT COSTS without LOSING QUALITY.
data.explain: 内容語を強く等間隔に。機能語(to, without)は短く挟む。

data.text: It was the BEST decision we ever MADE.
data.explain: 情報の核（best, made）に最も強い強勢が乗る。

data.text: Please CALL me when you GET there.
data.explain: 内容語(call, get, there)を強く。

data.text: We're TRYING to FINISH the REPORT by FRIDAY.
data.explain: 動詞・名詞を等間隔に強く。

data.text: The MORE you PRACTICE, the BETTER you GET.
data.explain: The 比較級, the 比較級 構文。内容語を強く。

data.text: It's not WHAT you know, it's WHO you know.
data.explain: 対比の核 what↔who に最も強い強勢。

data.text: I'll TAKE care of it RIGHT away.
data.explain: take care of / right away の内容語を強く。

data.text: Let's KEEP it SHORT and SIMPLE.
data.explain: keep / short / simple を等間隔に強く。

data.text: Let's TOUCH BASE before the CALL.
data.explain: touch base / call の内容語を強く。

data.text: The SOONER we START, the SOONER we FINISH.
data.explain: The 比較級構文。sooner/start/finish を強く。

data.text: We're RUNNING a bit BEHIND on the SCHEDULE.
data.explain: 内容語(running, behind, schedule)を強く。

data.text: It's WORTH doing if it SAVES us TIME.
data.explain: 情報の核(worth, saves, time)を強く。

data.text: Let's GET this DONE by the END of the DAY.
choices: let's / this / by the / of the
data.explain: 内容語(get, done, end, day)を強く。

data.text: Please SEND it BEFORE the MEETING.
data.explain: 内容語(send, before, meeting)を強く。

data.text: We CAN'T AFFORD to WAIT any LONGER.
data.explain: can't は否定で強く。内容語を等間隔に。

data.text: I REALLY NEED to TALK to YOU.
data.explain: 内容語(really, need, talk, you)を強く。

data.text: We've GOT to FINISH this by FIVE.
data.explain: 内容語(got, finish, five)を強く。

data.text: I CAN'T BELIEVE you DID that.
We MUST DELIVER on TIME.
data.explain: must と内容語(deliver, time)を強く。

data.text: PLEASE DON'T FORGET to CALL.
We SHOULD'VE STARTED much EARLIER.
data.explain: 内容語(started, earlier)と should've を強く。

data.text: I JUST WANT to MAKE SURE.
data.explain: 内容語(just, want, make, sure)を強く。

data.text: We CAN'T AFFORD to WAIT any LONGER.
I TOLD you it would WORK.
PLEASE SEND it as SOON as POSSIBLE.
data.explain: 内容語を強く、機能語は弱く。

data.text: We've NEVER SEEN anything LIKE it.
I REALLY APPRECIATE your HELP.
data.explain: 内容語(really, appreciate, help)を強く。

data.text: Let's MAKE SURE it's DONE RIGHT.
data.explain: 内容語を強く、機能語は弱く。

data.text: We CAN'T LET this SLIP through the CRACKS.
I COMPLETELY UNDERSTAND your POINT.
data.explain: 内容語(completely, understand, point)を強く。

data.text: Let's FOCUS on what REALLY MATTERS.
data.explain: 内容語を強く、機能語は弱く。

data.text: We MUSTN'T LOSE SIGHT of the GOAL.
It's NOT about BLAME; it's about LEARNING.
data.explain: 対比される内容語(not, blame, learning)を強く。

data.text: I'M NOT SURE that's the BEST IDEA.
data.explain: 内容語と not を強く。

data.text: Let's TAKE a STEP BACK for a SECOND.
data.explain: 内容語を強く、機能語は弱く。

data.text: It's WORTH DOING, even if it's HARD.
data.explain: 内容語(worth, doing, hard)を強く。

data.text: The POINT isn't SPEED; it's ACCURACY.
data.explain: 対比される内容語を強く。

data.text: Let's MAKE this DECISION TOGETHER.
We VALUE QUALITY over QUANTITY.
data.explain: 対比される内容語を強く。

data.text: PLEASE LET me KNOW if you NEED anything.
data.explain: 内容語を強く、機能語は弱く。

data.text: I THINK we SHOULD WAIT a BIT.
It's ABOUT PROGRESS, not PERFECTION.
data.explain: 対比される内容語を強く。

data.text: Let's GET to the BOTTOM of THIS.
It's NOT what you SAY, it's HOW you say it.
data.explain: 対比される内容語(not, say, how)を強く。

data.text: We NEED to THINK this THROUGH.
data.explain: 内容語を強く、機能語は弱く。

data.text: SUCCESS takes TIME, EFFORT, and PATIENCE.
data.explain: 列挙される内容語を強く。

data.text: Let's KEEP it SIMPLE and CLEAR.
PLAN for the WORST, HOPE for the BEST.
data.explain: 対比される内容語を強く。

data.text: We CAN'T AFFORD to WAIT any LONGER.
Let's TALK about WHAT we can CONTROL.
PROGRESS, not PERFECTION, is the GOAL.
data.explain: 対比される内容語を強く。

data.text: Let's FOCUS on what MATTERS most.
It's NOT about WINNING, it's about LEARNING.
data.explain: 対比される内容語を強く。

data.text: We HAVE to MAKE a CHOICE now.
data.explain: 内容語を強く、機能語は弱く。

data.text: LESS talk, MORE action.
Let's THINK before we ACT.
FACTS first, OPINIONS later.
Let's KEEP it SHORT and SIMPLE.
SLOW and STEADY wins the RACE.
Let's GIVE it our BEST shot.
ACTIONS, not WORDS, define US.
Let's MAKE every MOMENT count.
PROGRESS, not PERFECTION, is the GOAL.
We LEARN by DOING things.
THINK big, START small.
We GROW through what we GO through.
DREAM big, WORK hard, STAY humble.
choices: dream / big / work / hard / stay / humble

data.text: Let's TAKE it ONE step at a TIME.
DONE is better than PERFECT.
Let's KEEP it SIMPLE and CLEAR.
MEASURE twice, CUT once.
Let's FOCUS on the BIG picture.
LISTEN more, ASSUME less.
I'll CALL you BACK in the MORNING.
data.explain: 内容語（動詞・名詞）を強く。

data.text: Please TAKE a SEAT and WAIT.
We NEED more TIME to FINISH the PROJECT.
data.explain: 内容語を等間隔で強く。

data.text: The MEETING has been RESCHEDULED for MONDAY.
data.explain: 主要情報（名詞・動詞）に強勢。

data.text: I couldn't have DONE it without YOUR HELP.
data.explain: 感謝の焦点は『あなたの助け』。

data.text: It's NOT what you SAID, it's HOW you SAID it.
data.explain: not what/how の対比が焦点。

data.text: The PROBLEM isn't the STRATEGY, it's the EXECUTION.
data.explain: 対比の3語に強勢を置く。

data.text: I APPRECIATE the OFFER, but I have to DECLINE.
data.explain: 感謝→対比→決断の3語が核。

data.text: Let's MEET at the CAFE at THREE.
data.explain: 動詞・場所・時間が内容語。

data.text: Can you SEND me the FILE by TOMORROW?
data.explain: 動詞・目的語・期限が内容語。

data.text: Not ONLY is it EXPENSIVE, but it's also UNRELIABLE.
data.explain: not only ... but also の並列を対等に強調。

data.text: That's EXACTLY what I was GOING to SAY.
data.explain: 同意・共感の焦点は exactly と say。

data.text: I NEED to LEAVE by FIVE.
data.explain: 内容語（動詞・数字）強く。

data.text: She LIKES coffee in the MORNING.
We WENT to the PARK yesterday.
He CALLED me on MY BIRTHDAY.
I'll SEE you TOMORROW.
Please TURN OFF the LIGHTS.
We should PROBABLY LEAVE NOW.
The MEETING starts at THREE PM.
She CAN'T MAKE it TODAY.
We NEED to WORK on the STRATEGY.
I HAVE to CATCH the LAST TRAIN.
Let's TALK about it TOMORROW.
I DON'T KNOW what to SAY.
She's WORKING FROM HOME today.
The DEADLINE is on FRIDAY.
We should REVISIT the ASSUMPTIONS.
The PROPOSAL has some MERIT.
We NEED to align on PRIORITIES.
The IMPLEMENTATION requires SIGNIFICANT effort.
Let's STRESS-test our HYPOTHESIS.
I HAVE a QUESTION.
Can I ASK you SOMETHING?
We WENT SHOPPING last WEEKEND.
She's a GOOD TEACHER.
This is a NICE PLACE.
The RESULTS were SURPRISING.
We're AHEAD of SCHEDULE.
This is a TOUGH DECISION.
We MADE some PROGRESS today.
Let's CHECK the NUMBERS again.
It's a GOOD IDEA.
I like CHOCOLATE.
Where are you FROM?
How OLD are you?
I HAVE a PEN.
She's my SISTER.
I'm going HOME.
It's very HOT today.
Let's GO for a WALK.
I NEED some MILK.
The trade-offs are more NUANCED than they APPEAR.
We need to DECOMPOSE the PROBLEM.
This DECISION has DOWNSTREAM effects.
We should VALIDATE before we SCALE.
Let's SEPARATE the SIGNAL from the NOISE.
I APPRECIATE your PATIENCE.
We're on a TIGHT DEADLINE.
That's a REASONABLE POSITION.
Let's PRIORITIZE what MATTERS.
We can't AFFORD to WAIT.
The BUS is LATE.
I'm READY to GO.
Let me KNOW.
I'll GET back to you.
She's my BEST FRIEND.
Can I SEE it?
I MADE a MISTAKE.
Let's TRY it AGAIN.
What did you DO last WEEKEND?
I WORK from NINE to FIVE.
I don't LIKE it.
